description: Product Description AUKENIEN offers different kinds of fuse kits which is practical , high precision and stability to amazon customers. After rigorously testing, ​AUKENIEN fuse is safe and meet the British standard for BS1362 fuses . Providing products that meet your needs is our top purpose. Ceramic tube fuses assorted household UK are manufactured by AUKENIEN brand. 3 Values BS1362 Fuses Assorted Household UK Fuse model: 3A 5A 13A Dimension:6.3x25 mm /0.248x0.984 Inch. Rated Voltage: 240V. 15 Pcs * 3 amp fuse 15 Pcs * 5 amp fuse 15 Pcs * 13 amp fuse Fuses offer overcurrent protection. Easy for people to install. Widely application. Long-term stability. Length & Width The length of the fuse is 25mm/0.984inch which can meet the BS stand. Dimension:6.3x25 mm /0.248x0.984 Inch. Fit to uk plugs perfectly. Fuse Inside Filled with a containment substrate. Providing safety to overload. Meeting all requirements for BS1362. AUKENIEN BS1362 Fuse BS1362 ceramic tube fuse is manufactured by AUKENIEN with ASTA . Universal Suitable for UK domestic electrical household mains plugs, extension leads, fused outlets and fuse sockets. Easy to Distinguish Each amp fuse individually labeled the amperage and color which can be easily distinguished .
